case_title: CACH, LLC VS. KRISTINA J SORIANO et al

docket_entries.description: NON SERVICE/RETURN FILED BY PLAINTIFF CACH, LLC
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR DEC-04-2012 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 2:00 PM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF(S) OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) OF SUMMONS AND COMPLAINT. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR DEC-04-2012 CONTINUED TO MAR-05-2013 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610 FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). THE DEC-04-2012 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CACH, LLC AS TO DEFENDANT SORIANO, KRISTINA J DOES 1 TO 10, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  AUG-14-2012
AFFIDAVIT OF REASONABLE DILIGENCE FILED BY PLAINTIFF CACH, LLC
NON SERVICE RETURN FILED BY PLAINTIFF CACH, LLC
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF MAR-05-2013 IS OFF CALENDAR. DISMISSAL ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
